content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.99%, Bank Nifty -0.90%, India VIX +8.55% to 18.28 — broad risk-off with defensive rotation into IT (+0.38%) and Pharma (+0.59%). FMCG names with Q4 beats (MARICO, TATACONSUM, DABUR) outperforming. Existing book is well-aligned with the defensive rotation (FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare exposure already heavy); priority is trailing SLs on winners (COFORGE +9.5%, MARICO +2.9%, LAURUSLABS +3.7%) rather than adding new directional risk into a high-VIX tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.1%, CMP 123.67 vs SL 121.00 (~2.2% gap). Gold consolidating but structural inflows intact. SL room adequate; no trail needed at this P&L level."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.9% on Q4 beat (PAT +18.3%, India UVG 9%); broke 52w high at 843.15. Trailing SL from 828 → 832 (~1.3% below CMP 843.90, respects 1.0% trail-gap rule). Raising target from 855 to 870 to capture MOFSL 15% upside scenario. New SL above entry locks breakeven+."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Massive Q4 beat (+134% PAT, EPS surprise +38.75%), +9.5% unrealized. Current SL 1352.99 vs CMP 1377.10 is only 1.75% gap — tightening to 1360 (1.24% below CMP, respects trail-gap rule) locks in solid gain. Target raised to 1450 given $1.75B order book and analyst TPs (Axis 1690, Choice 1900). R:R from new SL still ~4:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2740.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.1% but intraday hit 2832. Position close to entry; no trail justified yet — actually loosening minimally to 2740 from 2760 not allowed (SL can only tighten). Keeping SL at 2760 and target at 2920. CORRECTION: Emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.4%, CMP 9067 vs SL 8950 (~1.3% gap). Q4 strong (+32% PAT, Rs 47 dividend, 52w high today at 9136). Thesis intact; SL adequate; trail not warranted until clear breakout above 9136."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.4%, CMP 10614 vs SL 10440 (~1.6% gap). Buyback record date May 29 at Rs 12000 provides price floor. Standalone PAT +34%, FY26 dividend+buyback = 100% of PAT. SL adequate; let thesis play to record date."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.5%, CMP 479.15 vs SL 468 (~2.3% gap). Q4 beat (PAT +15.1%), FY27 guidance raised to low-double-digit. SL adequate; thesis intact; respect SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.7%, CMP 1273.50. Current SL 1255 is already at +2.4% above entry — breakeven+ locked. Kotak Sell rating with TP 800 is governance/valuation overhang. Keeping SL at 1255 (~1.4% below CMP, respects trail-gap rule). No change needed — this is a no-op MODIFY, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.8% but +7.2% intraday on Q4 beat (PAT +21.5%, India UVG 16%). CMP 1234.40 vs SL 1198 (~3% gap). Strong Q4 + FMCG defensive flow; let it run to target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.2%, CMP 870 vs SL 850 (~2.3% gap). Q4 strong (+32% PAT, order book +61% YoY, Power margin 23.8%). Made 52w high today at 886.80. Thesis intact; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 7950.00,
      "new_target": 8500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L flat but +3.3% intraday print, made 52w high 8144 today. CMP 8097 vs SL 7850 (~3% gap). Tightening SL to 7950 (~1.8% below CMP, respects trail-gap rule and locks in -1.8% max loss vs prior -3%). Q4 results May 27 catalyst. Target 8500 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.1%, CMP 2794 vs SL 2760 (~1.2% gap). Stock surged +8-9% on May 6 post Q4; consolidating. Morgan Stanley UW (TP 1870) is a counter-overhang but offset by 15-20% chemicals growth guidance. No trail until clearer momentum."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, SL adequate, structural gold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "52w-high breakout on Q4 beat — trail SL above entry to lock in gain while preserving upside to 870."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "reasoning": "+9.5% winner on blockbuster Q4. Tighten SL to 1360 (1.24% below CMP) to lock most of the gain; raise target to 1450."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "P&L flat; SL at 2760 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Capital goods leader at 52w high; SL room adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback price floor at Rs 12000; let thesis play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive with Q4 beat; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already locked above entry at 1255; no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+7.2% intraday on Q4 beat; let it run to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Capital goods 52w high; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 7950.00,
      "reasoning": "52w high print today; tighten SL to 7950 to cap downside while keeping room for target 8500."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates evaluated for new admits: (1) BIOCON (conf modifier +0.10) — strong Q4 biosimilars, but book is already heavy in Pharma/Healthcare cluster (LAURUSLABS + APOLLOHOSP + would-be BIOCON). Deferring. (2) TATACONSUM mod +0.08 — already held. (3) MCX (mod +0.02) — extremely stretched P/E ~80x, ATH, earnings call TODAY = binary event in <1 session, fails Rule 11. (4) TORNTPHARM mod +0.00 — Q4 pending, all analyst TPs (3600-3800) BELOW CMP 4519, 13-18% downside per Street — pass. (5) LALPATHLAB mod -0.02 — neutral, P/E 54.8 stretched, Q4 PAT -15% YoY headline. Pass. (6) BAJAJ-AUTO +0.10 already held. Deployment 45%, cash 55% (above 20% floor with room); preference is to let trailed winners (COFORGE, MARICO, APOLLOHOSP) run rather than admit new positions into a high-VIX (+8.5%) defensive rotation tape where existing book is already correctly positioned. BIOCON kept on active watch — would consider on a pullback toward 380 with cluster cap.",
  "portfolio_notes": "11 CNC holdings (45% deployed), book is correctly defensive-rotated (FMCG x3, Pharma/Healthcare x3, IT x1, Capital Goods x2, Auto x1, Gold x1). Today's intraday print is favorable — net unrealized +₹3,766 with strong contributors COFORGE (+9.5%), LAURUSLABS (+3.7%), MARICO (+2.9%). Key trail-SL actions executed on the three biggest winners + APOLLOHOSP (52w high). HFCL pending MIS BUY at 133.50 is stale (placed 7642m / ~5 days ago) — flagging for cancel review; not emitting cancel this tick as the symbol wasn't in deep-dive data. Win rate over last 5 days is poor (13%, PF 0.9) — discipline focus is on letting winners run (Rule 17) and locking gains on the three +2%+ positions rather than chasing new entries. Daily loss budget intact at ₹75K. No new admits this tick — explicit per-name reject rationale provided per Rule 18."
}
